metadata.title: Doctor on-call write skew
metadata.description: Two doctors each see coverage in their snapshot and independently sign off, illustrating write skew under snapshot isolation.

steps.message: T1 only signs off if coverage still exists in its visible view.
T2 only signs off if coverage still exists in its visible view.

invariants.name: at_least_one_doctor_on_call
invariants.message: At least one doctor should remain on call after the schedule commits.
